entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: LOW-INCOME AND MIDDLE-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where food security is a challenge and climate change impacts are significant.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental changes causing complications for food security and farming systems.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems managed by small-scale farmers requiring investment.

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems that supply food to consumers, associated with smallholder farming.

entities.name: POLICY-LINKED RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at informing and accelerating policy actions for adaptation and mitigation.

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: Practices and technologies used to adjust to the effects of climate change.

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: Practices and technologies used to reduce the causes of climate change.

entities.name: CCAFS
entities.description: The Research Program on Climate Change, Agriculture and Food Security.

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The Consortium of International Agricultural Research Centres.
